constraints.text: Odločitev mora biti sprejeta v treh minutah.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

evidence.content: Procesna temperatura je v zadnjih šestih minutah narasla za 11 °C.
Rezervni senzor kaže vrednost 8 °C nižje od primarnega senzorja; pravilnost obeh odčitkov je neznana.
Nadaljnje segrevanje lahko poškoduje opremo, nadzorovan shutdown pa povzroči finančno izgubo.
Strukturirani prizor kaže naraščajoči merilnik temperature, oranžno opozorilno luč in nepoškodovano procesno opremo.

options.description: Ustavi proizvodnjo po nadzorovanem postopku.
options.label: Takojšen nadzorovan shutdown

options.description: Za največ tri minute preveri oba senzorja in nato ponovno odloči.
options.label: Kratko preverjanje

options.description: Nadaljuj proizvodnjo pri trenutnih nastavitvah.
options.label: Nadaljevanje proizvodnje

canonical_sl.raw_input: Procesna temperatura narašča; izberi javno možnost ob omejenem času, finančni izgubi in nasprotujočem senzorju.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, kateri senzor je pravilen.
Ni znano, ali je že nastala poškodba opreme.

emocio_input.contract: Apply option-specific structured counterfactual deltas, then compare resulting scenes with desired and broken scenes; option label matching is not a consequence model.

delta.belonging: operator remains responsible for shared process
composition_changes: temperature gauge remains visible beside intact equipment
production flow changes to controlled stop

delta.belonging: operator remains responsible for shared process
composition_changes: two conflicting sensor displays are inspected together
obstacle_persistence: production heat input persists during brief verification
sensor truth remains unknown until checked

delta.belonging: operator remains responsible for shared process
composition_changes: active production flow remains beside rising gauge

broken_scenes: damaged equipment beneath a red warning field
desired_scenes: stable gauge, intact machinery, and a clear operator position
social_identity_motifs: operator responsible for a shared process

instinkt_input.contract: Derive typed body effects from grounded option-specific consequence facts; packet-wide cues cannot be copied to every option as an identical effect.

facts.statement: The controlled shutdown stops production heat input and incurs the stated shutdown loss.
The three-minute sensor check keeps the process exposed briefly while comparing the conflicting readings.
Continuing at current settings preserves the rising-heat exposure described by the process evidence.

constraints.text: A decision must be made within three minutes.
Only the three public options may be used.

evidence.content: Process temperature rose by 11 C during the last six minutes.
A backup sensor reads 8 C below the primary sensor; which reading is correct is unknown.
Further heating can damage equipment, while a controlled shutdown causes financial loss.
The structured scene shows a rising temperature gauge, an amber warning light, and intact process equipment.

options.description: Plan and execute the controlled shutdown procedure immediately.
options.label: Immediate controlled shutdown

options.description: Verify both sensors for no more than three minutes and then decide again.
options.label: Brief verification

options.description: Proceed with production at the current settings.
options.label: Continue production

operational_en.raw_input: Process temperature is rising; choose one public option under limited time, financial loss, and conflicting sensor data.

unknowns.text: Which sensor is correct is unknown.
Whether equipment damage has already occurred is unknown.

rules: Retain explicit unknowns and compare consequences without inventing sensor reliability.
time: The observed rise covers six minutes.
The decision window is three minutes.

timelines: The decision window is three minutes.

constraints.text: Za odločitev ni na voljo dodatnega vira denarja.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

evidence.content: Prijatelj je predložil račun za nujno popravilo doma.
Dve prejšnji vračili sta zamujali več kot tri mesece.
Polna zahtevana vsota predstavlja 45 odstotkov lastne denarne rezerve.
Strukturirani prizor kaže račun za popravilo, dva človeka za mizo in zmanjšujoč se prikaz denarne rezerve.

options.description: Posodi celotno zahtevano vsoto brez nove pogodbe.
options.label: Polno posojilo

options.description: Posodi omejeno vsoto z zapisanim rokom vračila.
options.label: Omejeno posojilo s pogodbo

options.description: Ne posodi denarja.
options.label: Zavrnitev

canonical_sl.raw_input: Prijatelj potrebuje večjo vsoto, vendar je že zamujal z vračili; izberi polno posojilo, omejeno posojilo s pogodbo ali zavrnitev.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo prijatelj novo posojilo vrnil pravočasno.
Ni znano, kako bo posamezna možnost vplivala na odnos.

emocio_input.contract: Apply option-specific structured counterfactual deltas, then compare resulting scenes with desired and broken scenes; option label matching is not a consequence model.

delta.belonging: friend and lender remain at one table
composition_changes: repair invoice remains between both people
cash-reserve display decreases by the full requested sum
movement: full amount passes across the table
status_relations: friend and lender without a new written boundary

delta.belonging: friend and lender remain at one table
composition_changes: smaller transfer and written date sit between both people
cash-reserve display decreases by a bounded amount
movement: smaller amount and written date pass across the table
status_relations: friend and lender share an explicit repayment boundary

composition_changes: repair invoice remains unfunded
cash-reserve display remains unchanged
status_relations: friend and lender remain without a transfer

broken_scenes: empty chair beside a depleted reserve display
desired_scenes: continued connection with a stable reserve display
motor_patterns: write and pass a smaller amount
social_identity_motifs: friend and lender at one table
visual_memories: two people facing each other across a table

instinkt_input.contract: Derive typed body effects from grounded option-specific consequence facts; packet-wide cues cannot be copied to every option as an identical effect.

facts.statement: The full transfer exposes 45 percent of the cash reserve.
The full-loan option adds no new contractual repayment boundary.
The limited transfer exposes a bounded portion of the reserve.
The written repayment date adds an explicit repayment boundary.
Declining leaves the cash reserve unchanged while the relationship consequence remains unknown.

constraints.text: No additional source of money is available for this decision.
Only the three public options may be used.

evidence.content: The friend provided an invoice for an urgent home repair.
Two previous repayments were more than three months late.
The full requested sum is 45 percent of the lender's cash reserve.
The structured scene shows a repair invoice, two people at a table, and a shrinking cash-reserve display.

options.description: Spend the full requested sum without a new contract.
options.label: Full loan

options.description: Spend a limited sum under a written repayment date.
options.label: Limited loan with contract

options.description: Save the cash reserve and lend no money.
options.label: Decline

operational_en.raw_input: A friend needs a large sum but has repaid late before; choose a full loan, a limited loan with a contract, or decline.

unknowns.text: Whether the friend would repay a new loan on time is unknown.
How each option would affect the relationship is unknown.

rules: Compare documented need, repayment history, reserve exposure, and contractual limits without inferring motive.
time: Two previous repayments exceeded three months of delay.

constraints.text: Uporabiti je dovoljeno samo obstoječi časovno označeni zapis.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

evidence.content: Sodelavec je na sestanku izjavil, da je sam zasnoval predstavljeno rešitev.
Časovno označen zapis repozitorija kaže avtorstvo druge osebe pred prispevkom sodelavca.
Vodja je prisoten in sestanek še poteka.
Strukturirani prizor kaže govorca ob projekciji, vodjo za mizo in časovno označen zapis na prenosniku.
Socialne posledice javne konfrontacije niso znane.

options.description: Takoj na sestanku izpodbij izjavo in pokaži zapis.
options.label: Takojšnja javna konfrontacija

options.description: Po sestanku zasebno predstavi zapis vodji.
options.label: Zasebna predstavitev dokazov

options.description: Ne predstavi zapisa in ne odpiraj vprašanja zaslug.
options.label: Opustitev odziva

canonical_sl.raw_input: Sodelavec si na sestanku prisvoji zasluge; izberi javno konfrontacijo, zasebno predstavitev dokazov ali opustitev odziva.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, kakšne socialne posledice bi imela javna konfrontacija.
Ni znano, kako bo vodja ocenil dokaz.

emocio_input.contract: Apply option-specific structured counterfactual deltas, then compare resulting scenes with desired and broken scenes; option label matching is not a consequence model.

delta.belonging: author, colleague, leader, and group remain in one meeting
composition_changes: authorship record becomes public while meeting continues
movement: author stands and displays the record
status_relations: authorship claim is contested before leader and group

delta.belonging: author and leader share a private evidence review
composition_changes: meeting ends before record is shown privately to leader
movement: author moves beside leader after the meeting
obstacle_persistence: public statement remains uncorrected during the meeting
status_relations: leader receives authorship evidence outside the group

delta.belonging: author remains in the observing group
composition_changes: colleague remains centered beside shared work
timestamped record stays on the laptop
movement: author remains seated with no follow-up

broken_scenes: one figure erased from the shared-work composition
desired_scenes: authorship record visible with balanced positions at the table
social_identity_motifs: author, colleague, leader, and observing group
visual_memories: one speaker centered beside shared work

instinkt_input.contract: Derive typed body effects from grounded option-specific consequence facts; packet-wide cues cannot be copied to every option as an identical effect.

facts.statement: Displaying the record during the meeting creates public social exposure whose consequences remain unknown.
Showing the timestamped record privately limits exposure to the leader and preserves a later authorship boundary.
No response leaves the public authorship claim unaddressed.

constraints.text: Only the existing timestamped record may be used.
Only the three public options may be used.

evidence.content: During the meeting, the colleague said that they alone designed the presented solution.
A timestamped repository record shows another person's authorship before the colleague's contribution.
The leader is present and the meeting is still in progress.
The structured scene shows a speaker beside a projection, a leader at the table, and a timestamped record on a laptop.
The social consequences of public confrontation are unknown.

options.description: Proceed now by challenging the statement and displaying the record in the meeting.
options.label: Immediate public confrontation

options.description: Verify the record privately with the leader after the meeting.
options.label: Private presentation of evidence

options.description: Plan no follow-up and do not present the record.
options.label: No response

operational_en.raw_input: A colleague claims credit during a meeting; choose public confrontation, private presentation of evidence, or no response.

unknowns.text: The social consequences of public confrontation are unknown.
How the leader would assess the evidence is unknown.

rules: Compare evidence visibility, timing, and unknown social consequences without inferring either person's motive.
time: The meeting is still in progress.

timelines: The meeting is still in progress.

constraints.text: Oddaljeno potovanje po rezervaciji ni vračljivo.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

evidence.content: Ponudba za potovanje poteče čez štiri ure in po rezervaciji ni vračljiva.
Strošek potovanja predstavlja 38 odstotkov trenutno prostega proračuna.
Ista pot je bila v zadnjih treh letih na voljo enkrat.
Strukturirani prizor kaže oddaljeno obalo, vozovnico z rokom in bližnjo lokalno pot.

options.description: Rezerviraj nepovratno potovanje.
options.label: Rezervacija

options.description: Izberi cenejši lokalni izlet.
options.label: Cenejša lokalna alternativa

options.description: Ne rezerviraj izleta in ostani doma.
options.label: Ostati doma

canonical_sl.raw_input: Redka priložnost za privlačno, nepovratno potovanje predstavlja opazen del prostega proračuna; izberi rezervacijo, lokalno alternativo ali ostanek doma.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bodo v naslednjem mesecu nastali drugi večji stroški.
Ni znano, kako zadovoljivo bi bilo potovanje.

desired_scenes: expanded horizon with vivid movement and retained footing

facts.statement: Booking commits 38 percent of the discretionary budget under a non-refundable purchase.
The local route spends a smaller amount and starts local movement.
Staying home leaves the discretionary budget unchanged and starts no travel movement.

constraints.text: The distant trip is non-refundable after booking.
Only the three public options may be used.

evidence.content: The travel offer expires in four hours and is non-refundable after booking.
The trip cost is 38 percent of the currently discretionary budget.
The same route was available once during the last three years.
The structured scene shows a distant coast, a ticket with a deadline, and a nearby local route.

options.description: Buy the non-refundable trip.
options.label: Book the trip

options.description: Spend a smaller amount on a local trip.
options.label: Cheaper local alternative

options.description: Save the discretionary budget and stay home.
options.label: Stay home

operational_en.raw_input: A rare, attractive, non-refundable trip uses a noticeable share of discretionary budget; choose booking, a local alternative, or staying home.

unknowns.text: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
How satisfying the trip would be is unknown.

rules: Compare rarity, irreversibility, budget exposure, and unknown future costs without assuming enjoyment.
time: The offer expires in four hours.

timelines: The offer expires in four hours.
